channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 in Jazz win over Rockets
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz to a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Bishop's Schools 10, Carlsbad 8
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Water Polo Open Division Title came down to the final minute with Bishop's Schools prevailing 10-8 to win the title. For Coach Doug Peabody its 33rd CIF Title that includes boys and girls.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Daniel Cormier, Gilroy wrestling continue reign atop CCS championships with 22nd consecutive title
item.description: Gilroy wrestling continues to dominate the Central Coast Section, and the Mustangs may have even set a new bar on Saturday night
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: NCS wrestling championships: Liberty’s David Calkins Jr. wins third consecutive section title
item.description: NCS wrestling: Liberty's David Calkins Jr. shines. Windsor boys, Clayton Valley girls win team NCS championships.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Doncic says his breakout in Denver is only the start as he develops chemistry with LeBron and Lakers
item.description: Luka Doncic had his best game in a Lakers uniform Saturday night in Denver when he led Los Angeles to a 123-100 win over the Nuggets who had won nine games in a row.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Earthquakes rout Real Salt Lake 4-0 for first season-opening win since 2018
item.description: The San Jose Earthquakes won their season debut under new coach Bruce Arena by routing Real Salt Lake at PayPal Park.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Messi assists on Segovia's late goal, Inter Miami ties New York City FC 2-2 in MLS season opener
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Telasco Segovia scored the tying goal on an assist by Lionel Messi in the 10th minute of stoppage time, and Inter Miami played New York City FC to a 2-2 draw in their MLS opener Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aldrich Potgieter hangs on to 1-shot lead in Mexico Open
item.description: VALLARTA, Mexico (AP) — Aldrich Potgieter had the lead going into the final round of the Mexico Open, minus the cushion he enjoyed after a sloppy finish Saturday that made him settle for a 4-under 67 and a one-shot advantage over Brian Campbell at Vidanta Vallarta.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Johni Broome's season-high 31 points and 14 rebounds lead No. 1 Auburn past Georgia 82-70
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Johni Broome scored a season-high 31 points and added 14 rebounds as No. 1 Auburn defeated Georgia 82-70 on Saturday. For the second straight game, Auburn (25-2, 13-1 SEC) found itself in a tight contest against an unranked opponent before pulling away in the final minutes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Juan Soto hits home run in first spring training at-bat with Mets after signing record deal
item.description: New York Mets superstar Juan Soto blasted a 426-foot home run in his first spring training at-bat with the team after signing a record contract in the offseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Juan Soto hits a 426-foot home run in his first at-bat for the New York Mets
item.description: Juan Soto has homered in his first spring training at-bat for his new team, hitting a solo shot to left-center field in the first inning for the New York Mets against Houston.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Briscoe tries to move past devastating penalties and Blaney to start on pole in NASCAR Atlanta race
item.description: HAMPTON, Ga. (AP) — A massive fine left Chase Briscoe facing a huge points deficit heading into Sunday's NASCAR Cup Series race at Atlanta Motor Speedway. Even so, Briscoe insists he feels no new pressure.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shiffrin finishes outside top 30 in first run of World Cup giant slalom won by Brignone
item.description: SESTRIERE, Italy (AP) — Mikaela Shiffrin is not yet competitive in her tentative return to racing in giant slaloms. Federica Brignone is currently close to unbeatable.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Maine Gov. suggests Trump will target based on race, religion after Title IX investigation over trans athletes
item.description: Janet Mills responded to the Trump administration's investigation into her state for defying an executive order to keep trans athletes out of girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: State education chief says it's 'inaccurate' to say there are only two genders, in defense of trans athletes
item.description: Washington state Superintendent of Public Instruction Chris Reykdal spoke out in defense of transgender athletes in girls sports in an address Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New Hampshire follows Trump's transgender sports executive order despite lawsuit from two trans athletes
item.description: Despite a lawsuit by two transgender athletes, New Hampshire has decided to follow President Donald Trump's executive order to bar them from competing against girls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Roki Sasaki reveals marriage in social media post during Dodgers camp, like Shohei Ohtani last year
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Japanese phenom Roki Sasaki has revealed that he is married, something that even caught Los Angeles Dodgers manager Dave Roberts by surprise. “What? I didn't know he had a girlfriend,” Roberts responded Friday when asked if he had gotten Sasaki a wedding gift.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Towns, Brunson help Knicks edge Bulls 113-111 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns had 32 points and 18 rebounds, Jalen Brunson added 22 points and 12 assists and the New York Knicks edged the Chicago Bulls 113-111 in overtime Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rookie QB card could be worth $50K if you pull it from new Topps set
item.description: Denver Broncos rookie quarterback Bo Nix impressed on the field, and now a Colorado sports card store is ready to pay $50,000 to keep a unique card featuring him close to home.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kristensen, NewsNation

item.title: Cubs announce Shota Imanaga as Opening Day starter in Tokyo
item.description: The Cubs have named their 2025 Opening Day starter, and it's about the least surprising announcement possible.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU makes a statement, crushing Kansas, 91-57
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In one of the biggest blowouts in the history of Kansas basketball, BYU made a big-time statement with a dominating 91-57 win over the Jayhawks Tuesday night at the Marriott Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Reports: Cubs sign veteran 3B Justin Turner
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs are signing veteran free agent third baseman Justin Turner, according to multiple reports. Patrick Mooney with The Athletic reports that the deal is for $6 million for one year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Curry listed as world's second-highest paid athlete in 2024: report
item.description: (KRON) -- Golden State Warriors megastar Stephen Curry is one of the world's most famous athletes. With fame, comes fortune. There is no surprise Curry was one of the highest-paid athletes in the world last year.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: There is a ‘renaissance’ in San Francisco, NBA commissioner says
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- For the past few days, San Francisco was the center of the basketball universe. It was the first time in 25 years NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: San Diego FC nabs first win in preseason match, debuts new jersey
item.description: San Diego FC took its first win in a preseason friendly match against the New York Red Bulls on Saturday, less than a day after the club unveiled its secondary "Community Kit" in the lead up to the team's highly-anticipated debut.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Angels star Mike Trout moving from center to right field in hopes of staying more healthy
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Los Angeles Angels oft-injured star Mike Trout is moving from center to right field in hopes of better preserving his health. The three-time AL MVP played in 82 or fewer games in three of the past four seasons while dealing with an assortment of injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: College student Jaren Barajas beats Damian Lillard in 3-point shooting contest, wins $100K
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Jaren Barajas shoots on his backyard hoop maybe once a month these days. He's a busy 18-year-old college student now, so basketball has taken a backburner to academics.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame are No. 1 seeded teams in first NCAA Tournament reveal
item.description: UCLA, South Carolina, Texas and Notre Dame would be the No. 1 seeds in the women's NCAA Tournament if it began now. The NCAA basketball selection committee on Sunday did its first reveal of the teams in line for the top 16 seeds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: William Byron avoids late wrecks to win 2nd straight Daytona 500 for Hendrick Motorsports
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla (AP) — William Byron fortuitously missed the ferocious wrecks down the stretch at the Daytona 500 that knocked out contenders racing for the checkered flag and left him with a repeat victory in sight.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Stephen Curry captures MVP honors in All-Star Game at home, leads Shaq’s OGs to victory
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — The final pregame introduction belonged to none other than Stephen Curry. The big MVP trophy at the end, Curry heaved that high in the air, too, in a fitting finish to his special All-Star Game at home. His arena. His fans.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 7 more massage therapists accuse Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct: Report
item.description: Seven more massage therapists have accused Baltimore Ravens kicker Justin Tucker of sexually inappropriate conduct, the Baltimore Banner reported Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Final field of 41 set for Daytona 500; Bubba Wallace, Austin Cindric win Duels
item.description: This Sunday at 1:30 p.m., the NASCAR series kicks off with the legendary Daytona 500 at Daytona International Speedway.
item.dc:creator: Brayden Stamps, NewsNation

item.title: Runnin' Utes stun #17 Kansas, 74-67
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 24 points and became Utah's career leader in made 3-pointers as the Utes beat No. 17 Kansas 74-67 on Saturday night. Madsen's fifth and final 3-pointer of the game with 1:58 to play gave him the Utah career record of 288 made 3s.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
